headline: From Zero to ₹50 Lacs Revenue
description: We partnered with UT Sarees to build and scale their online presence from scratch. Through strategic Google Search and Shopping campaigns, we delivered exceptional results that transformed their business.
seoTitle: UT Sarees Case Study - From Zero to 50 Lacs Revenue
seoDescription: See how Kreative Catalyst helped UT Sarees achieve 50 Lacs in revenue with 10X ROAS through strategic Google Ads and SEO.
content:
We partnered with UT Sarees to build and scale their online presence from scratch. Through strategic Google Search and Shopping campaigns, we delivered exceptional results that transformed their business.

Our approach included comprehensive keyword research, optimized product feeds for Google Shopping, and targeted search campaigns. We continuously refined bidding strategies and ad copy to maximize return on ad spend.

The results speak for themselves: ₹50 Lacs in revenue generated, a 10X return on ad spend, and top 3 Google rankings for key search terms in the competitive fashion e-commerce space.

headline: First-Page Ranking for Competitive Keywords
description: The Usee Shop came to us struggling with visibility in a highly competitive niche. Our comprehensive SEO strategy achieved first-page ranking for "banarasi silk tissue saree" and drove significant organic sales growth.
seoTitle: The Usee Shop Case Study - First-Page Google Ranking
seoDescription: Learn how Kreative Catalyst achieved first-page Google ranking and 300%+ organic traffic growth for The Usee Shop in the competitive Banarasi silk niche.
content:
The Usee Shop came to us struggling with visibility in a highly competitive niche. Our comprehensive SEO strategy achieved first-page ranking for "banarasi silk tissue saree" and drove significant organic sales growth.

We conducted thorough keyword research, optimized on-page elements, created targeted content, and built quality backlinks. Our technical SEO improvements ensured the site was fully optimized for search engine crawlers.

The results were remarkable: first-page Google ranking for key competitive keywords, over 300% growth in organic traffic, and a significant increase in organic sales revenue.

headline: ₹30 Lakh in Sales with 14X ROAS
description: Through precise website-ad alignment and continuous optimization, we helped this e-commerce brand achieve remarkable returns. Our approach combined landing page optimization with targeted ad campaigns for maximum conversion.
seoTitle: E-Commerce Case Study - 30 Lakh Sales with 14X ROAS
seoDescription: Discover how Kreative Catalyst achieved 14X ROAS and 60% lower CPA for an e-commerce client through strategic ad campaigns and landing page optimization.
content:
Through precise website-ad alignment and continuous optimization, we helped this e-commerce brand achieve remarkable returns. Our approach combined landing page optimization with targeted ad campaigns for maximum conversion.

We focused on creating seamless user journeys from ad click to purchase. Landing pages were A/B tested and optimized for conversion, while ad campaigns were continuously refined based on performance data.

The outcome was outstanding: ₹30 Lakh in total sales, a 14X return on ad spend, and a 60% reduction in cost per acquisition compared to previous campaigns.
